basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Officer, Pharmacist and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.echs.gov.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Medical Officer, Pharmacist and More Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB, MBBS, DMLT/Class I Laboratory Tech Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years work experience, GNM Diploma/ Class I Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience, Pharmacy from a recognized Institute Or 10+2 with Science stream and approved Diploma in Pharmacy, Minimum 3 years experience, Class 8th GD trade (Armed Forces)
qualification.details: Gynaecologist: MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB Medical Officer: MBBS Laboratory Assistant/Technician: DMLT/Class I Laboratory Tech Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years work experience in Laboratory Assistant/Technician Nursing Assistant: GNM Diploma/ Class I Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience. Pharmacist: Pharmacy from a recognized Institute Or 10+2 with Science stream (Physics Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized Board and approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an Institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948), Minimum 3 years experience in Pharmacy Peon/MTS: Education-Class 8th GD trade (Armed Forces)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.ex_servicemen_contributory_health_scheme: MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB, MBBS, DMLT/Class I Laboratory Tech Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years work experience, GNM Diploma/ Class I Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience, Pharmacy from a recognized Institute Or 10+2 with Science stream and approved Diploma in Pharmacy, Minimum 3 years experience, Class 8th GD trade (Armed Forces)

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Gynaecologist: MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB Medical Officer: MBBS Laboratory Assistant/Technician: DMLT/Class I Laboratory Tech Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years work experience in Laboratory Assistant/Technician Nursing Assistant: GNM Diploma/ Class I Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience. Pharmacist: Pharmacy from a recognized Institute Or 10+2 with Science stream (Physics Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized Board and approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an Institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948), Minimum 3 years experience in Pharmacy Peon/MTS: Education-Class 8th GD trade (Armed Forces)

rows.event: Last Date of Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff posts is 10-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical and Para Medical Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for Medical and Para Medical Staff posts released by the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ECHS recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Gynaecologist post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Gynaecologist post is MD/MS in the Specialist concerned or DNB.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Nursing Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Nursing Assistant post is ₹36,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this ECHS recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection process steps?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of ECHS?
faq.answer: The official website of the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) is www.echs.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum work experience required for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of experience in Pharmacy is required for the Pharmacist post.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ECHS located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The ECHS recruitment is for the Lansdowne city in Uttarakhand.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff posts is 10-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.
